'''Norval II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Calaron sector/Legends|Calaron sector]] abounding with organic life.<ref name="SWR">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref>

==History==
It was the planet to which [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] sent the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] on a [[Mission to Norval II|mission]] to capture [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="THOTM">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>

[[File:Mandaloriansclonewars.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The [[Mission to Norval II]].]]

Sidious betrayed the Mandalorians, who were ambushed by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]<ref name="THOTM" /> and the [[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]].<ref name="GAW">''[[Galaxy at War]]''</ref> Only three Mandalorians survived: [[Tobbi Dala]], [[Fenn Shysa]], and [[Spar]].<ref name="THOTM" /> This betrayal also resulted in the destruction of the vast majority of [[BL-series Battle Legionnaire]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

During the war against the reborn Emperor in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Norval II provided starfighters for the armed force stationed at [[Pinnacle Base]].<ref name="DE">[[Dark Empire 2|''Dark Empire'' 2]]</ref>
